title: table operations
code:
local function filter(tbl, predicate)
    local result = {}
    for i, v in ipairs(tbl) do
        if predicate(v) then
            table.insert(result, v)
        end
    end
    return result
end

local numbers = {1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6}
local even = filter(numbers, function(x) return x % 2 == 0 end)

title: metatable
closure
code:
local function createCounter(start)
    local count = start or 0
    return {
        increment = function()
            count = count + 1
            return count
        end,
        decrement = function()
            count = count - 1
            return count
        end,
        get = function()
            return count
        end
    }
end

title: coroutine
code:
local function producer()
    return coroutine.create(function()
        for i = 1, 5 do
            coroutine.yield(i * i)
        end
    end)
end

local co = producer()
for i = 1, 5 do
    local status, value = coroutine.resume(co)
    if status then
        print(value)
    end
end
